message:
fix(web): CRLF injection in redirect Location header, constant-time bearer comparison

- middleware.rs: sanitize CR/LF from path before setting Location header
  in RedirectTrim and RedirectAlways trailing-slash strategies (MEDIUM)
- middleware.rs: use constant-time XOR comparison for ExactBearer token
  matching to prevent timing side-channel attacks (LOW)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
